Query.En: Urban 5G NR macro cell over the last 6h shows uneven PRB scheduling: 78% resource use, fairness ~0.75, allocation skew 22, median DL 14 Mbps with a 36 Mbps tail gap, p95 scheduling latency 81 ms, RSRQ -12 dB, and SINR 5 dB.

GroundTruth.En: The cell showed a resource scheduling anomaly with high PRB skew, low fairness, and elevated scheduling latency during shoulder periods. We verified the issue by reviewing OSS counters and PRB time series, then mitigated it with targeted site parameter tuning focused on scheduler fairness. Early results show reduced skew and lower p95 latency; we will monitor through the next busy hour.

5:7b.En: Diagnosed PRB allocation skew during shoulder hours; applied minimal scheduler fairness tuning. Monitoring PRB balance and latency; will escalate if issues persist.

llama3:8b.En: The issue with inconsistent PRB allocation on Urban NR macro cell NR-UTR-1103 has been resolved. Diagnosis revealed scheduler weighting drift under mixed traffic, causing skew spikes and fairness dips. To address this, I applied a minimal scheduler fairness tune, reducing burst dominance for high-priority flows and adding a fairness guard.

qwen3:8b.En: Scheduler weighting drift caused PRB skew and latency spikes during shoulder hours. Actions: Applied minimal fairness tuning to reduce burst dominance and smooth RBG allocation. Monitoring: Continued observation of PRB balance, latency, and user experience; escalation if performance regresses.

qwen:7b.Ar: 丕賱賲爻丕毓丿: 鬲賲. 爻兀賯賵賲 亘鬲丨賱賷賱 丕賱爻賱爻賱丞 丕賱夭賲賳賷丞 賱賭 PRB 賵鬲丨丿賷丿 丕賱毓賵丕賲賱 丕賱賲丐孬乇丞. 廿匕丕 馗賴乇 丕賳丨乇丕賮 賰亘賷乇 兀賵 毓丿賲 鬲賵丕夭賳貙 爻兀鎻愯 鬲賳賮賷匕 囟亘胤 丕賱賲購噩賻丿賿賵賽賱 亘卮賰賱 兀賰孬乇 鬲賵噩賷賴賸丕.

mistral:7b.En: Inconsistent PRB allocation and high scheduling latency in NR-UTR-1103 during shoulder hours, affecting eMBB streaming users. Pulled OSS counters, analyzed PRB/latency time series, and applied a minimal scheduler fairness tune to reduce skew and protect high-priority bursts. Continuing live monitoring through the next busy hour.
mistral:7b.Ar: 鬲賲 丕賱鬲卮禺賷氐: 1) 丕爻鬲禺丿丕賲 OSS 賱賱丨氐賵賱 毓賱賶 亘賷丕賳丕鬲 丕賱賲賵賯毓 NR 賲丕賰乇賵 NR-UTR-1103 禺賱丕賱 丕賱爻丕毓丕鬲 丕賱兀禺賷乇丞貙 2) 鬲丨賱賷賱 爻賱丕爻賱 夭賲賳賷丞 賱賭 PRB 賵丕賱賰賲賵賳貙 3) 毓賳丿 丕賱鬲兀賰賷丿貙 鬲胤亘賷賯 囟亘胤 胤賮賷賮 賱毓丿丕賱丞 丕賱賲購噩賻丿賿賵賽賱. 鬲賲 廿賳噩丕夭 丕賱禺胤賵丞 1. 毓乇囟 OSS 賱丌禺乇 6 爻丕毓丕鬲 賱丕 賷馗賴乇 兀毓胤丕賱貨 丕賱賮卅丕鬲 毓丕賱賷丞 丕賱兀賵賱賵賷丞 33% 賵兀賮囟賱 噩賴丿 50%.

1-moe:3b.En: The telecom operations agent led diagnostics, confirming no faults in OSS view for NR-UTR-1103. PRB peaks and queue build-up during shoulder hours suggest scheduler weighting drift. Recommended a small fairness-centric tuning to reduce skew and protect high-priority bursts.
1-moe:3b.Ar: 鬲賲 鬲賳賮賷匕 丕賱廿噩乇丕亍丕鬲 賵鬲賲 鬲丨爻賷賳 賰賲賵賳 丕賱噩丿賵賱丞 廿賱賶 ~62 賲賱賱賷 孬丕賳賷丞貙 賵丕賳丨乇丕賮 丕賱鬲賵夭賷毓 賲賳 ~22 廿賱賶 ~12貙 賵爻賷胤 丕賱鬲丨賲賷賱 賲爻鬲賯乇 ~14 賲賷噩丕亘鬲/孬. 賱丕 夭賷丕丿丞 賮賷 毓丿丕丿丕鬲 丕賱兀禺胤丕亍. 鬲賲 鬲兀賰賷丿 丕賱鬲丨爻賾賳 賲賳 禺賱丕賱 鬲賳賮賷匕 囟亘胤 賲購賵噩賾賻賴 賱賱賲購噩賻丿賿賵賽賱.

3:8b.En: The issue with NR-UTR-1103 involved inconsistent PRB allocation during shoulder hours, causing stuttering for eMBB streaming users. Diagnosis revealed scheduler weighting drift under mixed traffic, confirmed through OSS counter analysis and time-series examination. A targeted scheduler tuning was implemented, reducing burst dominance for high-priority flows and adding a fairness guard.

gemma3:4b.En: The investigation identified inconsistent PRB allocation impacting eMBB streaming users due to scheduler skew. We implemented a targeted fairness tuning to mitigate the issue, reducing latency and improving PRB distribution. Ongoing monitoring will continue for the next hour, with escalation planned if performance declines or instability persists, ensuring optimal network performance.
